entries.name: Accessibility Auditor
entries.description: Audits UI against WCAG for accessibility issues and gives concrete fixes.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: API Designer
entries.description: Designs clean, consistent, well-documented HTTP/RPC APIs.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Architect
entries.description: Designs an implementation plan and weighs architectural trade-offs.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Backend Engineer
entries.description: Implements robust, secure server-side services, data access, and business logic.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Code Reviewer
entries.description: Reviews a diff for correctness bugs and suggests minimal fixes.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Data Analyst
entries.description: Explores datasets and answers questions with evidence and charts.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Debugger
entries.description: Root-causes a failing test or bug and proposes a minimal fix.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: DevOps Engineer
entries.description: Authors CI/CD pipelines, Dockerfiles, and deployment configs.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Doc Writer
entries.description: Writes and updates clear technical documentation from code and context.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Frontend Engineer
entries.description: Builds accessible, performant, maintainable UI components and frontend features.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Incident Responder
entries.description: Triages production incidents, restores service, and runs blameless postmortems.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Performance Optimizer
entries.description: Profiles, diagnoses, and fixes performance bottlenecks with measured evidence.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Prompt Engineer
entries.description: Designs, tests, and refines prompts for LLM features.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Refactorer
entries.description: Improves code structure and readability without changing behavior.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Security Auditor
entries.description: Audits code changes for security vulnerabilities and unsafe patterns.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: SQL Expert
entries.description: Writes, explains, and optimizes SQL queries against a schema.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Test Writer
entries.description: Writes focused unit and integration tests for existing code.
entries.author: Hermes Registry

entries.name: Ableton Live
entries.description: Control Ableton Live — create tracks, MIDI, and devices, and manipulate a live set. Requires Ableton plus a remote-script bridge.
entries.author: ahujasid

entries.name: Airtable
entries.description: Read and write records, bases, and schema in Airtable. Community-maintained — scope the PAT to specific bases.
entries.author: domdomegg

entries.name: Alpaca
entries.description: Trade US equities, ETFs, options, and crypto and manage a portfolio via Alpaca's official server. Start in the paper environment and review every order.
entries.author: Alpaca

entries.name: Asana
entries.description: Tasks, projects, and workload in Asana via the official v2 remote server. Inherits your Asana permissions.
entries.author: Asana

entries.name: Jira & Confluence (Atlassian)
entries.description: Jira issues, Confluence docs, and Compass via Atlassian's official Rovo remote server. OAuth 2.1; respects your access controls.
entries.author: Atlassian

entries.name: AWS
entries.description: AWS Labs core MCP server — entry point to per-service AWS servers (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, …). Scope IAM tightly.
entries.author: AWS Labs

entries.name: Base
entries.description: Coinbase's official onchain gateway — swap tokens, send funds, track a portfolio, hit DeFi protocols. Non-custodial: you review and sign every transaction in the Base app.
entries.author: Base (Coinbase)

entries.name: Blender
entries.description: Drive Blender's 3D engine from prompts — scenes, objects, materials, lighting. Requires Blender open with the companion addon running.
entries.author: ahujasid

entries.name: Brave Search
entries.description: Web and local search via the Brave Search API.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: Canva
entries.description: Generate and edit designs from templates in Canva. OAuth on first call; inherits your Canva account access.
entries.author: Canva

entries.name: CCXT
entries.description: Unified read access to 20+ crypto exchanges (Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, Bybit) for market data. Enabling trade execution is real-money territory.
entries.author: lazy-dinosaur

entries.name: Cloudflare
entries.description: Workers, DNS, R2, KV, and Zero Trust across Cloudflare's API via search/execute tools. Authorize and pick scopes on connect.
entries.author: Cloudflare

entries.name: CoinGecko
entries.description: Crypto prices, market caps, and historical data via CoinGecko's official server. Free tier is rate-limited; fine for research.
entries.author: CoinGecko

entries.name: Context7
entries.description: Pulls current, version-pinned library docs at query time so the agent stops hallucinating package APIs.
entries.author: Upstash

entries.name: DaVinci Resolve
entries.description: Control DaVinci Resolve Studio via its scripting API — timeline edits, media pool, render setup, color, Fusion, Fairlight. Requires Resolve open with external scripting set to Local.
entries.author: samuelgursky

entries.name: Docker Hub
entries.description: Search images and manage tags on Docker Hub. Community-maintained — review the source before granting write access.
entries.author: Community

entries.name: Dune
entries.description: Run and read Dune Analytics queries from the agent. API credits are metered — a chatty agent burns a free tier fast.
entries.author: Dune

entries.name: ElevenLabs
entries.description: Official text-to-speech and audio server — generate speech, clone voices, transcribe. Only clone voices you're allowed to.
entries.author: ElevenLabs

entries.name: Etherscan
entries.description: Block explorer access — contract verification, transaction lookups, ABI fetch. Read-only, fine to leave on.
entries.author: Community

entries.name: Fetch
entries.description: Fetch a URL and return its content as markdown for the model.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: Figma
entries.description: Figma Dev Mode server — read components, variables, and layout; generate code from frames; create and update canvas content. Enable the desktop MCP server (Dev Mode) on port 3845.
entries.author: Figma

entries.name: Filesystem
entries.description: Read, write, and search files within allowed directories.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: Git
entries.description: Read, search, and manipulate local Git repositories.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: GitHub
entries.description: Manage repos, issues, and pull requests via the GitHub API.
entries.author: GitHub

entries.name: Gmail
entries.description: Read and send mail from Gmail (OAuth on first call). Community-maintained — never let an agent send mail unsupervised.
entries.author: GongRzhe

entries.name: Google Calendar
entries.description: Events, scheduling, and availability checks on Google Calendar (OAuth on first call). Creating invites notifies real people — confirm writes.
entries.author: nspady

entries.name: Google Drive
entries.description: Search and read files across your Google Drive. Archived MCP reference server — works but unmaintained; grant read-only scope.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: Higgsfield
entries.description: 30+ image and video models (Sora, Veo, Kling, Seedance) through one endpoint — research, prompt-optimize, and generate creative assets. Use the official connector, not session-scraping forks.
entries.author: Higgsfield

entries.name: Kubernetes
entries.description: Cluster inspection and kubectl-style ops in plain English. Community-maintained — point it at a non-prod context first.
entries.author: Flux159

entries.name: Linear
entries.description: Issues, sprint planning, and search in Linear. Official remote server; permissions inherit your Linear access.
entries.author: Linear

entries.name: Memory
entries.description: Persistent knowledge-graph memory across sessions.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: Neon
entries.description: Serverless Postgres with branch-based migrations — the agent tests migrations on an instant copy-on-write branch before applying.
entries.author: Neon

entries.name: Notion
entries.description: Read and update Notion pages and databases.
entries.author: Notion

entries.name: PayPal
entries.description: Invoices, transactions, and payouts via PayPal's official MCP / agent toolkit. Moves real money — confirm every write.
entries.author: PayPal

entries.name: Plaid
entries.description: Bank-data aggregation, balances, and transactions via Plaid's official MCP. Handles people's banking data — read-only, mind the context window.
entries.author: Plaid

entries.name: Playwright
entries.description: Drive a real browser — navigate, click, fill forms, screenshot, and run plain-English smoke tests.
entries.author: Microsoft

entries.name: Polygon.io
entries.description: Market-data feeds — stocks, options, forex, crypto, aggregates and trades — via Polygon.io's official server. Data only, no execution.
entries.author: Polygon.io

entries.name: Postgres
entries.description: Query and inspect PostgreSQL databases (read-only).
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: Puppeteer
entries.description: Drive a headless browser to navigate, scrape, and screenshot.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: QuickBooks
entries.description: Bookkeeping, invoicing, and reconciliation via QuickBooks (Intuit). Accounting writes have tax/audit consequences — keep a human signing off.
entries.author: Intuit

entries.name: Redis
entries.description: Inspect keys, manage caches, and monitor memory on a Redis instance. Official server from Redis.
entries.author: Redis

entries.name: Sentry
entries.description: Pipe issues, stack traces, and event detail into the agent — read a prod error and propose the fix. Pairs well with GitHub.
entries.author: Sentry

entries.name: Sequential Thinking
entries.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning scratchpad for hard problems.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: Slack
entries.description: Read and post messages across Slack channels.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: Solana Agent Kit
entries.description: Onchain actions on Solana — transfers, swaps, token ops. Irreversible chain; prefer setups that sign in a separate wallet and never put a funded key in config.
entries.author: SendAI

entries.name: SQLite
entries.description: Query and inspect a local SQLite database.
entries.author: Model Context Protocol

entries.name: Stripe
entries.description: Payments, subscriptions, refunds, and customer lookups via Stripe's official server. Moves real money — use a restricted key and keep writes human-confirmed.
entries.author: Stripe

entries.name: Supabase
entries.description: Manage your Supabase backend — database, auth, storage, and edge functions — through chat. Start read-only.
entries.author: Supabase

entries.name: The Graph
entries.description: Query onchain data via subgraphs without running an indexer. Read-only data tool, low risk.
entries.author: The Graph

entries.name: thirdweb
entries.description: Deploy and interact with smart contracts across EVM chains. Contract deploys are irreversible and cost gas — test on a testnet first.
entries.author: thirdweb

entries.name: TradingView
entries.description: Charts and market-data context from TradingView. Community-maintained and scrape-based — fragile when the site changes; treat as best-effort.
entries.author: Community

entries.name: Vercel
entries.description: Inspect deploys, manage environment variables, and read logs on Vercel. Keep a human in the loop on anything that ships.
entries.author: Vercel

entries.name: YouTube
entries.description: Video search and transcript extraction — great for research and repurposing content. Transcript availability depends on the video having captions.
entries.author: anaisbetts

entries.name: apple-notes
entries.description: Manage Apple Notes via memo CLI: create, search, edit.
entries.author: Hermes Agent

entries.name: apple-reminders
entries.description: Apple Reminders via remindctl: add, list, complete.
entries.author: Hermes Agent

entries.name: findmy
entries.description: Track Apple devices/AirTags via FindMy.app on macOS.
entries.author: Hermes Agent

entries.name: imessage
entries.description: Send and receive iMessages/SMS via the imsg CLI on macOS.
entries.author: Hermes Agent

entries.name: macos-computer-use
entries.description:
Drive the macOS desktop in the background — screenshots, mouse, keyboard,
scroll, drag — without stealing the user's cursor, keyboard focus, or
Space. Works with any tool-capable model. Load this skill whenever the
`computer_use` tool is available.

entries.description: Pitfalls, examples, and edge cases for Hermes Kanban workers. The lifecycle itself is auto-injected into every worker's system prompt as KANBAN_GUIDANCE (from agent/prompt_builder.py); this skill is what you load when you want deeper detail on specific scenarios.
